case_title: DAILLAK, KARA VS COHEN, DANIEL AGENT/MGR. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY DAILLAK, KARA AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, DANIEL  AGENT/MGR. COHEN, SANTANA, SCHEMENT, TENANTS IN COMMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COHEN, DANIEL  AGENT/MGR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAILLAK, KARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COHEN, DANIEL  AGENT/MGR. COHEN, SANTANA, SCHEMENT, TENANTS IN COMMON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTARIZED DECLARATION FILED BY JENNIFFER DAPARMA AND PUT IN COURTBOX;
THREE ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTS FROM PLAINTIFF FILED;
